extra.reason: Implemented first-run starter key bypass in start.rs: is_first_run_with_starter() detects single-key aivo-starter state and injects AIVO_STARTER_MODEL, skipping model picker. 4 unit tests added. 2906+ tests pass.
Added GitHub→R2 mirror fallback in materialize_github(): when primary download fails, retry via AIVO_GH_MIRROR env var. Fallback message prints once per attempt. 2 unit tests added. 2908 tests pass.
Added check_plugin_binary() pre-flight validation and improved spawn error messages with actionable hints. 4 new tests. 2912 tests pass.

Already fully implemented. is_format_mismatch, is_responses_api_required, send_chat_via_shared_fallback, send_copilot_responses_request, and route persistence all exist in chat.rs with tests. No new code needed.

Added RouteEvent phase to HttpDebugLogger with log_route_event() helper. Wired into serve_router's protocol auto-switch and failover paths. Router_selection test flakiness pre-existing (passes in isolation).
Implemented: data model, CLI CRUD, fallback routing in run command, exclusion tracking with expiry, naming constraints, persistence. All 2914 tests pass, clippy clean.
Implemented: provider→key matching via known_providers + substring fallback, orphan purge on key deletion, provider validation warnings on fallback create/update. All 2914 tests pass, clippy clean.
